Jason Gardner built Marqeta into the infrastructure layer behind companies like Square, DoorDash, and Affirm.

Abdulmalik AlSheikh helped build mada and Sadad; the backbone of Saudi Arabia’s payments ecosystem.

These are people who’ve already built financial infrastructure at massive scale.

When they both back the same company, it’s usually worth paying attention to.

kept.text:
Bitwise CIO: Big Tech Stablecoin Tests Could Help Drive Supply to 4 Trillion USD by 2030

Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan said stablecoin payout tests by major tech companies, including DoorDash and Meta, could help drive stablecoin supply from about $300 billion today to $4 trillion by 2030. DoorDash is working with Stripe to test stablecoin payouts for 10 million Dashers in over 40 countries, while Meta is launching similar programs for creators in the Philippines and Colombia via Solana and Polygon. Hougan said stablecoins’ main advantage is simplifying global micropayments, rather than cost savings.
